pr.title: fix(deps): bump pyopenssl from 25.1.0 to 26.0.0 (closes #91)
pr.body:
### SUMMARY

Completes the remediation of **CVE-2026-27459** and **CVE-2026-27448** ([GHSA-5pwr-322w-8jr4](https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-5pwr-322w-8jr4)) — pyOpenSSL DTLS cookie callback buffer overflow (HIGH severity).

Master already bumped pyopenssl to 26.2.0 and cryptography to 46.0.7. This PR adds the remaining fixes:

| File | Change |
|------|--------|
| `requirements/base.in` | Updated CVE comment to reference both CVE-2026-27459 and CVE-2026-27448 |
| `requirements/base.txt` | Bumped `pycparser` 2.22 → 3.0 (required by cffi 2.0.0 / cryptography 46.x) |
| `requirements/development.txt` | Same `pycparser` bump |
| `superset/utils/core.py` | Restored missing `return cert` in `parse_ssl_cert()` (removed when the backend check was cleaned up) |

### BEFORE/AFTER SCREENSHOTS OR ANIMATED GIF

N/A — dependency-only change with a bugfix for a missing return statement.

### TESTING INSTRUCTIONS

1. `pip install -r requirements/development.txt` — should complete without errors
2. `pytest tests/unit_tests/ -x -q` — should pass

#### Unit test results

```
7008 passed, 4 skipped, 2 deselected in 689.04s (0:11:29)
```

The 2 deselected tests are **pre-existing failures** unrelated to this PR (both due to `PlaywrightTimeout()` constructor requiring a `message` argument in newer Playwright versions):
- `test_per_tile_spinner_timeout_logs_warning_and_continues`
- `test_get_screenshot_handles_playwright_timeout`

#### Integration tests

Integration tests could not be run because `docker-compose-non-dev.yml` does not expose Postgres port 5432 to localhost. Docker services start successfully but are only accessible within the docker network.

### ADDITIONAL INFORMATION

- [x] Has associated issue: Fixes #91
- [ ] Required feature flags:
- [ ] Changes UI
- [ ] Includes DB Migration
- [ ] Introduces new feature or API
- [ ] Removes existing feature or API

Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/01adef28883c445883821e9332931a5e
